title: How to share a Google Drive file
description: Learn how to send files or documents to others using Google Drive links securely.

steps.title: Select your file in Google Drive
steps.body: Go to drive.google.com and locate the file you want to send. Right-click on it (or tap the three small dots).

steps.title: Click the Share button
steps.body: Select 'Share' from the drop-down menu. A box will open on your screen.

steps.title: Add email addresses
steps.body: Type the email address of the person you want to send the file to in the text box.

steps.title: Choose Viewer or Editor permissions
steps.body: Change the setting next to their email. Choose 'Viewer' if they should only read the file, or 'Editor' if they are allowed to change the text.

steps.title: Click Send
steps.body: Tap the blue 'Send' button. They will receive an email link to open the file.

glossary.definition: A digital filing cabinet on the internet where you can store documents, spreadsheets, and pictures safely.
A setting that lets someone look at your document but prevents them from changing or deleting any of its content.
